full_text:
Guanqiu Jian (Zhonggong) 毌丘儉 (仲恭)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guanqiu Jian (毌丘儉), styledZhonggong (仲恭), was born in Wen Xi, He Dong Commandery. Officer of Wei. Revolted against Sima Shi when he deposed Cao Fang. Guanqiu Jian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Guanqiu Jian lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
